heading: Independent acquisition project reviews of capital assets acquisition projects
label: 6312 Independent acquisition project reviews of capital assets acquisition projects
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2773 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.heading: .—Reviews
children.label: a .—Reviews
children.text: The appropriate head shall ensure that an independent entity conducts reviews of each capital assets acquisition project as the project moves toward the approval of each of critical decision 0, critical decision 1, and critical decision 2 in the acquisition process.
a review using best practices of the analysis of alternatives for the project; and
identification of any deficiencies in such analysis of alternatives for the appropriate head to address.

children.heading: .—Independent Entities
children.label: c .—Independent Entities
children.text: The appropriate head shall ensure that each review of a capital assets acquisition project under subsection (a) is conducted by an independent entity with the appropriate expertise with respect to the project and the stage in the acquisition process of the project.

The term “acquisition process” means the acquisition process for a project, as defined in Department of Energy Order 413.3B (relating to project management and project management for the acquisition of capital assets), or a successor order.

children.label: A
children.text: the Administrator, with respect to capital assets acquisition projects of the Administration; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Assistant Secretary of Energy for Environmental Management, with respect to capital assets acquisition projects of the Office of Environmental Management.

children.label: A
children.text: the total project cost of which is more than $500,000,000; and

children.label: B
children.text: that is covered by Department of Energy Order 413.3B, or a successor order, for the acquisition of capital assets for atomic energy defense activities.
